_comment: Copy this file to config.json and paste your free USDA NASS key below. Get one in ~1 min at https://quickstats.nass.usda.gov/api (it is emailed instantly). config.json is gitignored so your key never leaves your machine.
_comment_ams: OPTIONAL. USDA AMS Market News (MARS API) key for the live cash-bid + basis panel. Free: register at https://mymarketnews.ams.usda.gov, then copy the key from 'My Profile'. Leave blank to skip the AMS panel. Build machine must also reach marsapi.ams.usda.gov.
_comment_yield_seed: Pre-August US-yield anchor (bu/ac) from the latest WASDE trend yield; every state's 2026 estimate ties to it. Ignored automatically once USDA NASS publishes a national yield for the crop (~Aug 12). Update this to the newest WASDE trend before August.
